violations.text: Raw animal foods such as raw quail and chicken eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as cooked foods in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025
Gaskets for the walk-in cooler and 1 door reach-in freezer were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2025
Floor tiles in the kitchen area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Additional staff to obtain food safety certificate discussed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a prep unit. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

Raw animal foods such as raw quail eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as lettuce in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

Various foods in the prep unit were observed held at 45-53 degrees Fahrenheit. Foods were assessed during time of inspection- potentially hazardous foods and foods that require refrigeration for food safety were voluntarily disposed of. Raw pork belly was placed into walk-in cooler to blast chill (food was deemed safe due to competing organisms). Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Unit was taken out of service to hold foods that require refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the prep refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025
Gaskets for the walk-in cooler and 1 door reach-in freezer were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 07/04/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the food processor and blender have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
The doors to the toilet rooms are not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025

Area around dumpster was observed with an accumulation of litter and boxes. Area to be maintained clean to prevent attractants and harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025
Floor tiles in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025

Soup was observed held at 83 degrees Fahrenheit over counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge soup was left over the counter for more than 4 hours. Food item was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

There was standing water in the blender which was stored as clean. After cleaning and sanitizing, equipment and utensils shall be air-dried or used after adequate draining. Blender was washed, rinsed, and sanitized during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the walk-in cooler area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
The plumbing from the glass washer in the bar area is connected to and drains directly to hand sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2024

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. - Preparation sink is lacking a air gap. inspector observed an air break. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2024
Some floor tiles in the kitchen are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2024
